about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a Computer Engineer and solution-oriented developer. I've broadened my skill set from <0>mobile development (Flutter/Dart)</0> and Python instruction to <0>full-stack web solutions (Node.js/React)</0>. I care about <0>Clean Architecture</0>, Agile methodologies, and sustainable, high-quality code.

contact.title: Contact
